reasons: Candidate requires at least two evidence points.
Candidate does not align with the deterministic long/short trigger rules.

short.setup_name: Failed IBH fade into VWAP/ORBL loss
why_it_qualifies_under_orbz_rules: Rule 1 bearish branch triggered.
IBH rejection plus VWAP/ORBL loss supports short continuation.
Rule 1 bearish sequence completed from the screenshots.
Tape context favors fading YM rallies while NQ leads.
Compliance gates passed.
short.what_would_invalidate_it: Reclaim and hold above 49616 VWAP/ORBL pivot.
evidence: IBH rejection wick is visible near 49747.
VWAP and ORBL break together at 49616.
RTY lag plus firming DXY confirmed bearish context.
ibh_rejected_with_wick=true
vwap_orbl_lost_after_ibh_rejection=true

long.what_would_invalidate_it: Lose VWAP after reclaim and fail to recover.
